name: Green Beans Supreme
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook beans according to package directions.
2. Melt 1/4 cup margarine in a small saucepan over medium heat.
3. Stir in onions, flour, and salt.
4. Gradually stir in milk. Cook, stirring constantly, until the mixture starts to boil.
5. Remove from heat and add cheese. Stir until the cheese is melted.
6. Combine cooked green beans with cheese sauce.
7. Pour into a casserole dish.
8. Combine bread crumbs and 2 tablespoons melted margarine. Sprinkle over the top of the green bean mixture.
9. Bake in an oven preheated to 350°F for about 15 minutes. Serve hot.
